summary: Tested automatic integrity check (Reports > إغلاق الصندوق). Backend: 7 passed / 1 skipped (previous regression) + 5/5 new tests. Scheduler startup log present. Post-close on clean shift creates NO integrity_alert. Frontend: manual button [data-testid='integrity-check-btn'] correctly REMOVED. Panel [data-testid='integrity-results-panel'] DOES appear AUTOMATICALLY with title 'فحص السلامة التلقائي' when closings load and re-runs on تحديث. HOWEVER — critical bug: panel shows 0/0/0 (no mismatch cards) even though the API without branch filter returns checked=7, ok=5, mismatch=2 for the same range. Root cause: frontend sends branch_id=all when 'جميع الفروع' is selected, and the backend treats 'all' as a literal branch id, returning 0 shifts. This makes the automatic panel misleading in the default (all branches) view.

critical.issue: Passing branch_id=all returns checked=0 instead of treating it as no filter. Same range without branch_id returns checked=7. Either accept 'all' as sentinel OR frontend must strip it.

ui_bugs.issue: Sends branch_id=all when localBranchId==='all' → API returns 0 rows → auto panel always shows 'فحص السلامة التلقائي: 0 شفت — 0 متطابق' with green 'الحسابات سليمة 100%' banner. This is a FALSE ALL-CLEAR that hides real mismatches (2 mismatches exist per API). Fix: `if (localBranchId && localBranchId !== 'all') params.append('branch_id', localBranchId);`

integration_issues.flow: Auto integrity check on default (all branches) view
integration_issues.issue: Panel renders but data is 0/0/0 due to branch_id=all bug; mismatch cards [data-testid^='integrity-mismatch-'] never render in default view

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix integrity check branch filter bug — either frontend strips branch_id='all' before appending (Reports.js ~1261) or backend `/api/integrity/shifts-check` treats branch_id in ('all','','*') as no-op. Preferred: frontend fix (one-liner). After fix, panel should show checked=7 ok=5 mismatch=2 with 2 mismatch cards for range 2026-06-25..2026-07-07.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js line 1261: `if (localBranchId) params.append('branch_id', localBranchId);` — must exclude sentinel 'all'. Same issue may exist in similar closings fetch code paths (double-check other endpoints where localBranchId is forwarded).

runIntegrityCheck silently swallows errors and sets integrity=null (line 1264-1266). Combined with the branch_id=all bug this hides API failures from the user. Consider logging or showing a subtle 'تعذر فحص السلامة' badge.

useEffect depends only on [closingsHistory] (line 1277). If closings load returns the same empty array on error, panel won't re-run. Consider also depending on [dateRange.start, dateRange.end, localBranchId] to guarantee re-run on filter change.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 executed, 1 skipped for missing cashier account)
success_rate.frontend: 60% — auto-run + button-removal + auto-rerun work, but data is wrong in default view due to branch_id=all bug

seed_data_creation: Test inserts+removes clean TEST_ITER283_SHIFT_* (cleaned in finally block)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The manual button was successfully removed and panel auto-appears — verified. The ONLY blocker is the branch_id=all filter bug in runIntegrityCheck. Backend scheduler + post-close async task work correctly (no false alarms on clean close). Backend pytest suite: use env DB_NAME=maestro_pos (not the default 'test_database' baked into old fixtures). Directly-inserted date via Playwright input.fill on <input type='date'> DOES propagate to React state (verified via captured network calls with correct start/end).
rca of the issue: runIntegrityCheck builds URLSearchParams and unconditionally appends branch_id whenever localBranchId is truthy. The branch dropdown uses 'all' as a sentinel for 'جميع الفروع', so the URL becomes /api/integrity/shifts-check?start_date=...&end_date=...&branch_id=all. Backend shifts-check filter Mongo query {branch_id:'all'} matches zero shifts, so response is {checked:0, ok_count:0, mismatch_count:0, rows:[]}. Panel then renders the 'safe' green state and hides real mismatches. Reproduction: login admin, /reports → إغلاق الصندوق → keep 'جميع الفروع' → set 2026-06-25..2026-07-07 → click تحديث → observe panel = 0 شفت while list below shows 4 closings + backend curl without branch_id returns checked=7. Mitigation: `if (localBranchId && localBranchId !== 'all') params.append('branch_id', localBranchId);`.
